findings.evidence: `JHolomorphicTransport.lean:83-87` already gives the within-at theorem for arbitrary `t` with `Set.MapsTo`; existing `JHolomorphic.lean:268-273` setwise composition similarly takes an arbitrary source set plus a `MapsTo` hypothesis.
findings.fix: State the primary theorem with `{t : Set V'}` and an assumption `Set.MapsTo (fun y : V' => eV.symm y) t s`, concluding holomorphicity on `t`; keep the `eV '' s` version as a corollary if desired.
findings.issue: `IsJHolomorphicOn.transport` only transports to the exact image `eV '' s`, but the natural setwise form should allow any transported-domain set `t` whose points map back into `s`.

summary: The setwise transport theorem is stated below the natural level already used by the within-at theorem and the existing composition API.
